name: codex-commit-commands
description: Git commit, push, pull request, and stale branch cleanup workflows for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Commit, push PR, and clean stale branches
interface.longDescription: A lightweight Codex plugin inspired by the Claude commit-commands workflow. It provides explicit skills for creating one commit, committing and opening a GitHub pull request, and cleaning local branches whose upstream branch is gone.
defaultPrompt: Use $commit to create a single git commit from the current changes.
Use $commit-push-pr to commit changes, push the branch, and create a GitHub pull request.
Use $clean-gone to remove local branches whose upstream branch is gone.
